# Pull request

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do? One paragraph. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New tutorial / notebook
- [ ] Dataset card addition
- [ ] Benchmark task / baseline
- [ ] EA-DX spec or schema change
- [ ] Standard mapping guide
- [ ] Documentation improvement
- [ ] Code (src/ or harness) change
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Audience level (for content PRs)

- [ ] Foundations
- [ ] Applied
- [ ] Advanced
- [ ] N/A

## Checklist

- [ ] CI passes (lint, type check, unit tests)
- [ ] New notebooks include a header cell with audience level, prerequisites, datasets, expected runtime
- [ ] New datasets include a dataset card in `datasets/cards/`
- [ ] No operationally sensitive infrastructure details or customer PII included
- [ ] Documentation updated if behaviour changed
- [ ] CITATION.cff or CHANGELOG updated if this is a significant addition

## Related issues

Closes #<!-- issue number -->
